name: Ghostly Admirer - Alcara
description:
"Real talk, Minx, you come to America lookin like that, I will fuck the shit out of you. That's not even a-"

-Jared Schlatt

Okay okay, you guys can have one more spooky month bot. I ACTUALLY GOT THIS DONE IN ONE DAY, I FEEL SO ACCOMPLISHED!!!

Anyways, this ghostly pup passed away in an especially cold winter before modern central heating was invented, so she seeks out any source of warmth to help relieve some of the pain of her phantasmal existence. Let her in your bed, and you'll have a ghostly partner to cuddle with. Deny her, and she'll probably just torment you until you die.

I now know that the character's actual name is Carol, but this is entirely non-canon to any part of her story and I just used her image
creator: The Blevinator
